title: Engine 2: Tribal Alignment — Sell the Line, Not the Like
summary: Durable rapport from shared standards, not shared tastes. Align step names the broken norm both parties reject — tribe replaces vendor/buyer dynamic. Highest-margin moat because discounts compete on price but standards compete on identity. Scope-disciplined: the scapegoat must be real or the mechanism becomes manipulation. See girard_shared_enemy_mechanism for the ethics and safe scapegoat library.
